sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12957" key="a)pokrouni/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκρουνίζω</orth>, <sense id="n12957.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spout, gush out,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.699d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
